name: Linda's Whole Wheat Zucchini-Banana Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat eggs.
2. Add the applesauce, vanilla, sugar, zucchini, and mashed banana.
3. Mix together well and add remaining ingredients.
4. Pour into 2 greased and floured loaf pans (approximately 3x9x3 deep).
5. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
6. Bake for 45 minutes to 1 hour, or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
7. Makes two loaves.
